input.objective: Implement a deeper trader recall gate in /Users/mrcagents/Work/projects/agent-smart-memo so ASM generic auto-recall does not semantically recall trader tactical memory into the generic path. Scope: edit only agent-smart-memo files. Primary targets: src/hooks/auto-recall.ts and src/core/retrieval-policy.ts, with narrow test updates only if needed. # Skill: beads

# Beads Workflow - Multi-Agent Task Coordination

> **Replaces** ad-hoc task tracking with sticky notes, TODO comments, or mental checklists that lose state between sessions
## When to Use

- Coordinating multi-session work with dependencies, blockers, or file locking needs
- Running multi-agent work where tasks must persist across sessions and handoffs

## When NOT to Use

- Single-session, linear tasks tracked via TodoWrite
- Quick changes with no d

# Skill: verification-before-completion

# Verification Before Completion

## When to Use

- Before claiming tests/lint/build pass or a bug is fixed
- Before committing, opening PRs, or stating completion in a status update

## When NOT to Use

- While still actively coding without a completion claim
- When you cannot run verification commands yet (e.g., missing dependencies) — resolve first

Implemented with scoped edits only in requested files plus narrow tests.

## Exact diff summary

### `src/core/retrieval-policy.ts`
- Extended `ScoreSemanticCandidateInput` with:
  - `suppressionPenalty?: number` (`src/core/retrieval-policy.ts:14`)
- Added constant:
  - `TRADER_TACTICAL_SUPPRESSION_PENALTY = 0.5` (`src/core/retrieval-policy.ts:28`)
- Added trader recall gate types:
  - `TraderRecallGateInput` (`src/core/retrieval-policy.ts:30`)
  - `TraderRecallGateResult` (`src/core/retrieval-policy.ts:40`)
- Added helper and gate functions:
  - `normalizeAgentToken(...)` (`src/core/retrieval-policy.ts:61`)
  - `isTraderOwnerPath(...)` (`src/core/retrieval-policy.ts:74`)
  - `isTraderTacticalCandidate(...)` (`src/core/retrieval-policy.ts:87`)
  - `resolveTraderRecallGate(...)` (`src/core/retrieval-policy.ts:115`)
- Updated scoring:
  - `scoreSemanticCandidate(...)` now applies suppression penalty after base/session/promotion boosts:
    - computes `suppressionPenalty` (`src/core/retrieval-policy.ts:201`)
    - computes `boostedScore` (`src/core/retrieval-policy.ts:202`)
    - returns `finalScore = max(0, boostedScore - suppressionPenalty)` (`src/core/retrieval-policy.ts:211`)

### `src/hooks/auto-recall.ts`
- Updated imports to include:
  - `resolveTraderRecallGate` (`src/hooks/auto-recall.ts:12`)
- In `selectSemanticMemories(...)`:
  - Added deterministic gate resolution per candidate (`src/hooks/auto-recall.ts:379`)
  - Passed `suppressionPenalty` into `scoreSemanticCandidate(...)` (`src/hooks/auto-recall.ts:407`)
  - Added hard exclusion filter so non-owner generic paths do not recall trader tactical candidates (`src/hooks/auto-recall.ts:432`, `src/hooks/auto-recall.ts:444`)
- Shared/curated namespaces (`shared.project_context`, `shared.rules_slotdb`, `shared.runbooks`) remain in existing flow; only trader tactical candidates are gated.

### `tests/test-auto-recall.ts`
- Added test:
  - `"trader tactical memories are excluded from generic assistant recall"` (`te
